title: Adapter Response
description: A response returned from a non-authoritative adapter to the Rust harness.

protocol_version.description: Version of the adapter protocol this response conforms to.

adapter_name.description: Name of the adapter that produced this response.

adapter_version.description: Version of the adapter that produced this response.

status.description: Status of the adapter execution: PASS, FAIL, BLOCKED, or UNKNOWN.

raw_output_ref.description: Reference to the raw output artifact. Adapter output is untrusted.

structured_output_ref.description: Reference to the structured output artifact. Adapter output is untrusted.

usage.description: Resource usage reported by the adapter.

errors.description: Error messages reported by the adapter, if any.
